static-edge.scope: Compiled SPA assets only; API traffic is routed to a Node backend.

persistent-node.scope: Compiled Manta Node server with PostgreSQL and durable external adapters.

vercel-serverless-node.scope: Manta fallback plus explicit fast functions on nodejs24.x.
conditions: DATABASE_URL capacity includes at most two PostgreSQL connections per warm fast-function instance.
Upstash, Resend and provider credentials are configured for the enabled features.

backend-edge.scope: API routes, jobs, subscribers and database-backed fast functions.
backend-edge.reason: The reachable runtime graph uses Node crypto, PostgreSQL TCP, Buffer and Node-only Manta adapters.
